title: bot: self_test uses unwrap_or_default() on missing params
description: In main.rs self_test (line 281), notif.params.unwrap_or_default() returns empty JSON {} if params is None. This masks deserialization failures—if the relay sends WhisperDeliver without params, serde_json::from_value will deserialize the empty object and silently produce WhisperDeliverParams with zero/None fields, not an error. Correct: require params field or log a warning if None.
